ops.title: cc-skills AGENTS.md ccx entry 2 still says 'semble-backed' — update to native
ops.body: cc-context v0.30.0 replaced semble with a native in-process semantic engine, but the AGENTS.md ccx numbered-entry 2 ('code search (semantic, semble-backed)') is rendered from the upstream cc-skills source (github:yasyf/cc-skills, pinned in .claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock), not a local fragment, so it could not be updated in the cc-context PR (guides pr-check rejects hand-edits to CI-owned artifacts). Update entry 2 in cc-skills to: native in-process engine, no external process, one-time model-weight cache download, plus the new --content filter (space-separated code|docs|config|all, default 'code docs') honored on ccx code search/related and the MCP search/related tools. cc-context README.md + SKILL.md (not CI-owned) already carry the native wording.
